holdings.infoBox: PALU is an equity ETF with a total of 17 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins stock at 50.17%, Palo Alto Networks at 23.55%, Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 12.90%, Palo Alto Networks Inc Swap at 11.48%, and Palo Alto Networks Inc Swap at 11.16%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily PANW Bull 2X ETF (PALU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Palo Alto Networks, Inc. stock. PALU was launched on Mar 26, 2025 and is issued by Direxion.
